what_it_does: Records metadata for a channel attachment of type board_items that points to a specific board item in the dragnet-development channel.
observations: YAML frontmatter only, no body content
Target is a board:// URI referencing item-30eef5c3
standouts: Target uses a board://item-30eef5c3 URI scheme
conventions: Uses YAML frontmatter for ledger metadata
References an external board item via a URI
concerns: No body or description of what the board item contains
Target board:// URI cannot be resolved from this file alone
No author or reason for the attachment is recorded
notes: A minimal ledger stub that links a dragnet-development channel memory attachment to board item item-30eef5c3.
questions: What content or state does board item item-30eef5c3 represent?
What does attachment_type board_items imply about the relationship?
Why is there no body or explanatory text?
Is the referenced board item within the same project?
purpose_vs_actual: Stated purpose as a channel attachment record matches the actual content: it is a typed, timestamped reference stub.
apparent_themes: cross-referencing channel memory to board items
intention_signals: It appears to be trying to create a durable, typed pointer from a channel memory entry to a specific board item so the two can be correlated later.
contribution: Provides a timestamped, typed link between a channel memory attachment and a board item, preserving provenance and a resolvable reference without duplicating board content.
summary_for_embedding: A YAML-frontmatter channel attachment record linking the dragnet-development channel to board item item-30eef5c3 with attachment_type board_items and an added timestamp.
intention_for_embedding: To establish a traceable, typed reference from a channel memory entry to a board item for retrieval or context.
